This '''[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport]]''' was used by [[The Muunilinst 10]] during their mission to [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]. It was heavily modified and sported a unique paint job.

==Characteristics==
The ship's most striking feature was its paint job. A glaring [[Rancor/Legends|rancor's]] mouth was painted on the nose, just below the cockpit and covering the frontal turrets. The spine and wings were painted blue, as were the missile pods with the exception of some panels. A pattern of jagged blue isosceles triangles extended from the spine down the sides of the fuselage, and a similar pattern of white triangles was present on the back edge of the wings.<ref name="BattleHypori" />

The gunship was also heavily altered from a standard LAAT/i, with features such as a modified cockpit, a bomb bay, and jamming signal technology. The side-mounted composite-beam laser bubble turrets were removed, and it is possible that the wing-mounted turrets were as well, since they did not fire when the gunship engaged the droid army or General Grievous. A long, narrow barrel similar to those of the laser cannons was added to the front of the mass-driver missile launchers, giving them an appearance similar to the ventral weapons on the [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transport]].<ref name="BattleHypori" />

==History==
[[The Muunilinst 10]] was sent to Hypori to rescue the survivors from the encounter with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. Their gunship, flying at just under two meters, was able to sneak past hundreds of droids, and drop remote control [[Thermal detonator/Legends|detonators]] before they took notice. After dropping off [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Fordo]] and his team, the gunship rose to a vantage point and began firing at the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]] that had begun to charge their location.<ref name="BattleHypori" />

[[File:Arc_Ship.jpg|thumb|left|The gunship on Hypori]]
Shortly after this, Fordo called for backup. The [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando pilot|pilot]] of the LAAT immediately broke off and flew to the Muunilinst 10's position, where the ARC Troopers had encountered [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and were losing ground fast. The gunship opened fire on the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] general with both its anti-personnel [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turrets]] and [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver missile]] launchers.<ref name="BattleHypori" />

[[File:ARCLartyMeetsGrievous.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The LAAT facing General Grievous]]
Grievous evaded the entire barrage of fire, retreating to a safe distance from the gunship. The ARC Troopers then successfully rescued the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], loading them and the remaining troopers onto the gunship and taking off, detonating the previously dropped charges to clear their escape route.<ref name="BattleHypori" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Rancor'' pattern on the nose of the ship is a reference to real-life fighter planes with similar paint schemes.
